day_1_intro.speaker: Boss
day_1_intro.text: ...You, there! Careful where you step, this is an archeological site.

day_1_intro_2.speaker: Inez
day_1_intro_2.text: Oh, hi! It's not often that people wander out to the digsite.

day_1_intro_2-extra.speaker: Inez
day_1_intro_2-extra.text: My name is Inez, and you are..?

day_1_intro_4.speaker: Boss
day_1_intro_4.text: [NAME]! You must be the new recruit coming in from the city. Welcome to Amaranth Heights, and welcome to the Amaranth Archeology team. We’re happy to have you.

day_1_intro_5.speaker: Inez
day_1_intro_5.text: Oh, welcome! I didn’t realize you were going to be working with us.

day_1_intro_7.speaker: Boss
day_1_intro_7.text: Now that you’re here, we can get started. Inez, why don’t you head into camp and get everything set up?

day_1_intro_9.speaker: Boss
day_1_intro_9.text: Ha Ha Ha. While Inez is doing that, I’ll show you the ropes.

day_1_intro_10.speaker: Boss
day_1_intro_10.text: Its nothing too complicated, I’m sure you’ll get it in no time.

day_1_intro_11.speaker: Player
day_1_intro_11.text: I look forward to working with you.

day_1_tutorial.speaker: Boss
day_1_tutorial.text: Your workdays will include digging up fossils, cleaning and preparing them, and taking fossils to the museum.

day_1_tutorial_2.speaker: Boss
day_1_tutorial_2.text: You’ll start with digging up fossils. All of our dig sites are on these open patches of land, see?

day_1_tutorial_3.speaker: Boss
day_1_tutorial_3.text: Look for the dark patches of dirt on the ground, that usually means there’s something just under the surface.

day_1_tutorial_4.speaker: Boss
day_1_tutorial_4.text: Then go dig in the patch until you find something.. Or until you can’t see anything there anymore.

day_1_generic_work.speaker: Boss
day_1_generic_work.text: Head into the tent to get started on the fossil preparation, or to the pit for digging.

day_1_generic_digging.speaker: Boss
day_1_generic_digging.text: Head into the pit for digging.

day_1_generic_cleaning.speaker: Boss
day_1_generic_cleaning.text: Head into the tent to get started on the fossil preparation.

day_1_work_finish.speaker: Boss
day_1_work_finish.text: Great work today! These all look… huh?

day_1_work_finish_2.speaker: Player
day_1_work_finish_2.text: Ah.. one of the fossils I found.

day_1_work_finish_3.speaker: Boss
day_1_work_finish_3.text: I’m not sure what this one is, but it doesn’t look like it's supposed to be here.

day_1_work_finish_5.speaker: Boss
day_1_work_finish_5.text: Ha Ha Ha! Are you playing a prank on me?

day_1_work_finish_6.speaker: Boss
day_1_work_finish_6.text: You’ve certainly got a sense of humor.

day_1_work_finish_7.speaker: Boss
day_1_work_finish_7.text: Here, take all those other fossils to the museum. You can keep your little toy.

day_2_boss_help.speaker: Boss
day_2_boss_help.text: Can I help you with anything?

choices.text: How do I clean the fossils I find?

day_2_boss_excavate.speaker: Boss
day_2_boss_excavate.text: Look for the dark patches of dirt and interact with them to dig up whatever is under the ground.

day_2_boss_clean.speaker: Boss
day_2_boss_clean.text: Bring your fossils into the tent to clean them.

day_2_boss_fossil.speaker: Boss
day_2_boss_fossil.text: Ha ha ha. It didn't work on me last time, and it won't work now.

day_2_boss_fossil_2.speaker: Boss
day_2_boss_fossil_2.text: ...you seriously dug that up again? Look, [NAME], someone must have thrown that onto the site as a joke. Don't worry about it.

day_3_boss_help.speaker: Boss
day_3_boss_help.text: Can I help you with anything?

choices.text: How do I clean the fossils I find?

day_3_boss_excavate.speaker: Boss
day_3_boss_excavate.text: Look for the dark patches of dirt and interact with them to dig up whatever is under the ground.

day_3_boss_clean.speaker: Boss
day_3_boss_clean.text: Bring your fossils into the tent to clean them.

day_3_boss_fossil_2.speaker: Boss
day_3_boss_fossil_2.text: You’re really dedicated to this prank, huh?

day_3_boss_fossil_3.speaker: Boss
day_3_boss_fossil_3.text: Look, kid, this is a serious job.

day_3_boss_fossil_4.speaker: Boss
day_3_boss_fossil_4.text: That thing looks human. You can’t expect me to believe you really excavated it.
